name: Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. engages in the TV and animation businesses in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It is also involved in the production and releasing of teleplay, supplemented by online teleplays; and research and development, and operation of mobile online games. In addition, the company develops IP derivative products; and manufactures toy products. Further, it invests in the culture, film, Internet, industry fund, financial services, and high and new technology industries; and researches and develops animations. The company was formerly known as Huawei Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. in May 2016. Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shantou, the People's Republic of China.
